title: Subsurface heat conduction — recover soil thermal diffusivity from REAL USCRN temperatures
governing_equations: T_t=\alpha\,T_{zz},\ z\in[5,100]\,\mathrm{cm};\ \text{5 \& 100 cm = real Dirichlet boundaries},\ \text{recover }\alpha,\ \text{validate vs held-out 10/20/50 cm}
expected_band: damped, phase-lagged seasonal wave with depth; held-out 10/20/50 cm relative-L2 vs REAL temps ~7e-2 (~1 deg C RMSE)

variants.note_en: Soil-temperature field reconstructed from real 5/100 cm boundaries; validated out-of-sample vs 10/20/50 cm.
variants.note_es: Campo de temperatura de suelo reconstruido desde bordes reales 5/100 cm; validado fuera de muestra vs 10/20/50 cm.
